calendar.matters:
OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2020 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-19-2020 Vacated

Petition For Order To Transfer Personal Property To Trust And Imposition Of Constructive Trust For Payment Of Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jul-08-2020 Continued To Aug-17-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randall Boessenecker appeared by telephone for Nancy Alvarado (Petitioner).
Michael Freedman appeared by telephone for William Boyd (Petitioner).
James McCarthy appeared by telephone for Ernesto Valencia.

Mr. McCarthy stated that they don't have any more formal discovery to do. Mr. Freedman stated that they went to mediation in November of 2019, that the matter did not settle and that they have been waiting a long time to go to trial. The Petition for Order to Transfer Personal Property to Trust and Imposition of Constructive Trust for Payment of Attorney's Fees is set for trial in the Department of the Presiding Judge (206) on August 17, 2020 at 9:30 a.m., (order for the same signed in court). Counsel are to obtain a copy of the order from the Court's website. The Court spoke of its ADR program that is available to the Parties. The Court also suggested that the Parties confer as to the format of the trial (zoom, etc.).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Order To Transfer Personal Property To Trust And Imposition Of Constructive Trust For Payment Of Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jul-08-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order To Transfer Personal Property To Trust And Imposition Of Constructive Trust For Payment Of Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Continued To Apr-15-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Freedman for William Boyd (Petitioner).
Randall Boessenecker for Nancy Alvarado (Petitioner).
James McCarthy for and with Ernesto Valencia.

The Court stated that when it orders a joint status report, it wants one. Mr. Freedman stated that the joint status report was filed this morning (endorsed copy provided in Court). The Court stated that it wants a specific description of what the issues are and the actual disputes of fact that will be tried at the evidentiary hearing. Mr. Freedman stated that he is not anticipating needing much at all as to the deposition and that he would like to have a trial date to be clear as to all of the cutoffs. The Petition for Order to Transfer Personal Property to Trust, etc. is continued to April 15, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that it anticipates that the Parties will be sent out to Department 206/the trial department on that date. A joint status report regarding status of discovery, the issues to be tried, disputes of facts, witness lists, time estimates, etc. is to be filed by April 8, 2020.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

Petition For Order To Transfer Personal Property To Trust And Imposition Of Constructive Trust For Payment Of Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Continued To Feb-05-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randall Boessenecker for Nancy Alvarado (Petitioner).
Michael Freedman for William Boyd (Petitioner).
James McCarthy for and with Ernesto Valencia (Respondent).

Mr. Freedman stated that the matter did not settle, that they need a trial date and that he is done with discovery. Mr. McCarthy stated that he still needs to do discovery because there was no compliance with discovery. The Parties are to file a joint status report that addresses status of discovery, the claims that need to be tried, any disputed claims, who the witnesses are, the length of time of witness testimony and the overall length of trial no later than January 29, 2020. The Petition for Order to Transfer Personal Property to Trust, etc. is continued to February 5, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

Petition For Order To Transfer Personal Property To Trust And Imposition Of Constructive Trust For Payment Of Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Continued To Jan-08-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Randall Boessenecker for Nancy Alvarado (Petitioner)
Michael Freedman for William Boyd
James McCarthy for and with Ernesto Valencia (Respondent)

The Court inquired when this case will be ready to be set for trial. Mr. Freedman requested referral for pro bono mediation within 45 days.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than November 25, 2019. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by December 4, 2019. The Petition for Order to Transfer Personal Property to Trust and Imposition of Constructive Trust is continued and the Parties are to return on January 8, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: T. Jackson. Not reported.

Petition For Order To Transfer Personal Property To Trust And Imposition Of Constructive Trust For Payment Of Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Sep-25-2019 Continued To Oct-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order To Transfer Personal Property To Trust And Imposition Of Constructive Trust For Payment Of Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Aug-21-2019 Continued To Sep-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order To Transfer Personal Property To Trust And Imposition Of Constructive Trust For Payment Of Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Continued To Aug-21-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Freedman for William Boyd (Petitioner).
James McCarthy for and with Ernesto Valencia (Objector).
John Boessenecker for Nancy Alvarado (Petitioner/Trustee).

Mr. Freedman stated that they filed an 850 petition, that there were objections which raised another issue, that he filed an amendment, that there is a dispute as to distribution of the proceeds from the sale and that he would like to set the matter for trial. Mr. McCarthy stated that he has had no contact with Counsel and that he can't believe they can't have any discussion at all. The Court informed Counsel that it will not set the matter for trial until all discovery is completed. The Petition for Order to Transfer Personal Property to Trust, etc. is continued to August 21, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for proper notice of the amendment.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Peitition 1) To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust; 2) For Disqualification Of Prohiited Transferee; 3) For Fraud

Peitition 1) To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust; 2) For Disqualification Of Prohiited Transferee; 3) For Fraud
Off Calendar Sep-17-2018 Continued To Dec-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Freedman for William Boyd (Petitioner).
Randall Boessenecker for Nancy Alvarado (Respondent).

The Court stated that it did not review the objections as no courtesy copies were provided. Mr. Freedman stated that they have agreed to do mediation. The Court signed an order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than December 3, 2018. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by December 5, 2018. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on December 10, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
